Table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE2

Card of table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE2

Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE2

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE2

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE2

---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURES

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

WITH CleanedProductCatalog AS (

SELECT

MD5(

COALESCE(EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, '-1')||

COALESCE(TO_VARCHAR(__LOAD_TS), '-1')

) AS MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY,

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

FROM (

SELECT

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,

__LOAD_TS,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

ORDER BY __LOAD_TS DESC

) AS rn

FROM DB_CONS_STG_QAS.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG

)

WHERE rn = 1

),

 

RankedFeature AS (

SELECT

MD5(

COALESCE(f.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(f.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(f.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(f.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_LOCALIZEDVALUES_EN_VALUE, '-1')

) AS RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE_KEY,

pc.MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY,

f.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE AS COUNTRY_CODE_BK,

f.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE AS PRODUCT_CODE_BK,

f.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_CODE AS FEATURE_CODE_BK,

f.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_LOCALIZEDVALUES_EN_UNIT AS FEATURE_LOCALIZED_VALUE_UNIT,

f.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_LOCALIZEDVALUES_EN_VALUE AS FEATURE_LOCALIZED_VALUE_BK,

f.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_NAME_EN AS FEATURE_NAME,

f.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_UNLOCALIZEDVALUES_UNIT AS FEATURE_UNLOCALIZED_VALUE_UNIT,

f.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_UNLOCALIZEDVALUES_VALUE AS FEATURE_UNLOCALIZED_VALUE,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY

f.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

f.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,

f.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_CODE,

f.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_LOCALIZEDVALUES_EN_VALUE

ORDER BY f.__LOAD_TS DESC

) AS row_priority

FROM DB_CONS_STG_QAS.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURES f

LEFT JOIN CleanedProductCatalog pc

ON f.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE = pc.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE

AND f.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE = pc.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

)

 

SELECT *

FROM RankedFeature

WHERE row_priority = 1;

 

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_LOCALIZEDVALUES_EN_VALUE

Primary key(s) Target: PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE_KEY

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD1

 

----------

RLS

----------

based on COUNTRY_CODE_BK (events_country_code)

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE2

CKT_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATUR


Server validation rule of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE2

%RULES%


Code preview of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE2

drop table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE2 cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE2
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE2 (

);

alter table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE2 set comment = 'Reference data entity capturing the features assigned to a product, including feature codes, feature names, and localized or unlocalized values describing extended technical or commercial product characteristics.';
